name: Classic White Linen Shirt
description: A breathable and lightweight white linen shirt, perfect for beach weddings or summer casual smart looks. Features a mandarin collar and relaxed fit.

name: Navy Blue Slim Fit Chinos
description: Versatile navy chinos made from stretch cotton twill. Ideal for office wear or semi-formal dinners. Pairs well with light colored shirts.

name: Silk Floral Wrap Dress
description: Elegant midi wrap dress in 100% silk with a vibrant floral print. Great for garden parties and romantic dates.

name: Leather Loafers Brown
description: Handcrafted brown leather loafers. Classic design suitable for both business casual and weekend outings.

name: Black Oversized Hoodie
description: Premium heavy cotton hoodie in black. Streetwear essential with a boxy fit and dropped shoulders.
